title: CAST (Community Arts Stabilization Trust)
name: CAST (Community Arts Stabilization Trust)
body:
Nonprofit acquiring and stewarding affordable space for arts organizations. Now confirmed taking on day-to-day administration of the CRFW Fund as of early 2026: **Louise Martorano**, the fund's primary administrator since founding, moved from Executive Director at RedLine Contemporary Art Center to Managing Director of National Programs at CAST Colorado sometime between October 2024 and April 2026. The April 2026 grant letter to Raphael Jacobs was issued on her CAST email signature (`lmartorano@cast-sf.org`). RedLine likely remains fiscal sponsor; CAST handles administration. _(Updated 2026-04-24 from email correspondence — thread `19d4f2ffa41130bd`.)_

Name correction: 'Stabilization', not 'Sustainment'.
